name_cn:
Chanel 24B Felt Glitter CF
Dimensions: 10x20x7cm
The new 24B felt glitter CF is bursting with girlishness. The gentle tone and texture capture the heartstrings. The pinkish hue is like the softest cherry blossoms brushing against a girl's dream in spring. The bag body is embellished with small gold double-Cs, like a fairytale wonderland, intoxicating. The pink-gold woven chain design makes the bag look even more ethereal. The felt material combined with exquisite plaid shows an unintentional elegance and sweetness. The beautiful bag I'm talking about is her.
